---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for prodex
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
<!-- What are you trying to do that prodex makes hard or impossible today? -->

**Proposed solution**
<!-- What you'd like to see. -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Other approaches, or how you work around it now. -->

**Scope notes**
<!-- prodex is intentionally manual-first and local-only, and deliberately avoids turning ChatGPT Pro into an API. Please keep proposals consistent with that posture (see the README operating rules). -->
